title: VEVOR Beverage Dispenser, 3L Drink Dispensers for Parties, Glass Juice Dispenser with No-Drip Spigot and Lid, Iced Tea Lemonade Juice Water Dispensers for Restaurants, Hotels, Parties
features: 3L Continuous Supply: Our beverage dispenser has a large capacity of 3L, designed to save you time and reduce the need for frequent refills. It ensures a continuous supply of your beverages for busy restaurants, hotels, and parties

No Drip Spigot: Equipped with a tightly sealed spigot, the drink dispenser is convenient for dispensing without leakage, so you won't have to worry about cleaning spilled drinks. It helps keep your drink station clean and aesthetic
Perfect Display: The transparent design beautifully showcases your juice or drinks, ideal for displaying fruit tea, iced tea, juice, water, and more
Easy to Use: The wide-mouth design makes the juice dispenser easy to refill, while the lid prevents dust or dirt from entering, ensuring your juices stay clean and delicious
Easy to Clean: Made from food-grade glass, the juice dispenser for parties is stain-resistant, durable, and dishwasher-safe. The removable lid and wide opening make cleaning the interior effortless
description: From the manufacturer Beautiful Glass Beverage Dispenser - Surprise Your Party With a capacity of 3 L / 0.8 gallons, this beverage dispenser ensures a continuous supply of beverages, reducing the need for frequent refills, perfect for busy restaurants, hotels, and parties. The premium spigot is tightly sealed to prevent drips, keeping your drink dispenser station clean at all times. The low-position spigot ensures a smooth flow for effortless dispensing. Made from food-grade glass, the juice dispenser is stain-resistant, durable, and dishwasher-safe. Ideal for iced tea, juice, or water. The transparent glass cylinder shows drink levels clearly, while the wide-mouth design makes refills easy. The lid prevents dust or dirt from entering, ensuring your juices stay clean and delicious Whether for busy restaurants, elegant hotels, or cozy family gatherings, this large drink dispenser offers a perfect beverage experience for you and your guests.
